title: Prescription Expense Assistance * Cancer - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Prescription Expense Assistance * Cancer 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions AIDS/HIV Cancer Medicare Beneficiaries Older Adults Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CANCERCARE CO-PAYMENT ASSISTANCE FOUNDATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides co-payment assistance for prescribed chemotherapy or targeted treatment drugs to eligible applicants. 485 Madison Avenue New York, NY 10022 Eligibility: To qualify for assistance, client must meet certain financial, medical and insurance criteria. Hours: Monday-Thursday 6am-4pm, Friday 6am-2pm Email (866) 552-6729 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LEUKEMIA AND LYMPHOMA SOCIETY FINANCIAL SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical expense assistance programs to help with insurance co-payments and/or insurance premium costs for prescription drugs related to blood cancer treatment. Also, may Provide financial assistance for ground transportation, air travel, and lodging-related expenses. 3 International Drive Suite 200 Rye Brook, NY 10573 Eligibility: -Must have a confirmed blood cancer diagnosis -Must have income no higher than 500% of the Federal Poverty Level -Must be a United States citizen or permanent resident Additionally, for the Co-Pay Assistance Program: Must have medical and/or prescription insurance Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-6pm Email (877) 557-2672 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
